inline_comments: Manages voice calls: state ownership and delegation to manager helper modules.
Initialize the call manager with a provider. Verifies persisted calls with the provider and restarts timers.
Rebuild providerCallIdMap from verified calls only
Restart max-duration timers for restored calls that are past the answered state
Already expired — remove instead of keeping
Verify persisted calls with the provider before restoring. Calls without providerCallId or older than maxDurationSeconds are skipped. Transient provider errors keep the call (rely on timer fallback).
Skip calls without a provider ID — can't verify
Skip calls older than maxDurationSeconds (time-based fallback)
Verification failed entirely — keep the call, rely on timer
Get the current provider.
Initiate an outbound call.
Speak to user in an active call.
Speak the initial message for a call (called when media stream connects).
Continue call: speak prompt, then wait for user's final transcript.
End an active call.
Process a webhook event.
Get an active call by ID.
Get an active call by provider call ID (e.g., Twilio CallSid).
Get all active calls.
Get call history (from persisted logs).

functions.name: initialize
functions.doc: Initialize the call manager with a provider.     Verifies persisted calls with the provider and restarts timers.

functions.name: speak
functions.doc: Speak to user in an active call.

functions.name: speakInitialMessage
functions.doc: Speak the initial message for a call (called when media stream connects).

classes.name: CallManager
classes.doc: Manages voice calls: state ownership and delegation to manager helper modules.
